title: Operator Sprint Week — Full Audit Overhaul
body:
## Summary

2-commit comprehensive audit of animearchive.app. All changes on operator-sprint-week branch.

### SEO
- FAQPage schema from systemQuestions on universe pages
- HowTo schema from aiInsights on universe pages
- Organization schema with TikTok sameAs on homepage
- ItemPage schemas for all 15 universes in catalog
- robots.txt: Disallow:/api/ + proper sitemap
- sitemap.xml: all URLs including /about and /privacy

### Analytics
- trackExternalLink: TikTok, MAL, BuyMeACoffee tracked
- trackShareButton: clipboard vs native_share tracked
- All footer and CommunityPulse external links tracked

### New Pages
- /about — archive mission + creator info
- /privacy — GoatCounter policy, affiliate disclosure
- 404 NotFound — with random universe button

### UX
- Floating scroll-to-top button
- TikTok follow CTA in homepage hero
- About + Privacy links in footer

### Data
- introductionSummary added to all 10 missing universes (all 15 now complete)

### Bug Fix
- validateIndexing.js: fixed false-positive on Disallow:/api/

### validate:all: 0 errors, 1 pre-existing warning
head: operator-sprint-week
